construction.operation: ordered union of the frozen protocol-v4 development and gate manifests

quote_circuit.selection_rule: minimum edge count among circuits exact against P(x) on all 1,280 declared prompts; break ties by lower threshold

program_replacement.synthesis_acceptance: exact projected agreement against P(x) on all 1,280 declared prompts
program_replacement.composition_acceptance: full and circuit-only accuracy against P(x) both equal 1.0 on all 1,280 declared prompts
program_replacement.quote_primary_requirement: every attention head retained by the selected quote circuit must be replaced by a frozen accepted program
program_replacement.post_healing_requirement: the re-extracted healed quote circuit must contain no retained neural attention head; installed programs being merely present is insufficient
program_replacement.partial_replacement_fallback: recordable but does not support a zero-bilinear quote-circuit claim

healing_gates.behavior_domain: the same fixed 1,280-prompt D; there is no train/gate split and no out-of-sample claim
healing_gates.migration: every installed program is individually necessary in full and circuit-only forwards, and joint removal is non-bypassed

verification_scope.behavioral: exhaustive evaluation of every x in the declared finite D
verification_scope.formal: SMT properties use their separately declared bounded token-sequence domains and must not be described as proofs over D unless D itself is encoded

relationship_to_v4: The protocol-v4 held-out-generalization result remains stopped and unchanged. This continuation uses all 1,280 already evaluated prompts as a declared specification domain and makes no held-out claim.
bracket_policy: Bracket type is deferred until after the quote flagship. Its existing 340-edge circuit is exact on D; any later partial-replacement run must report retained neural heads and remaining bilinear terms explicitly.
